LanguageData.Baseliner.description: Wastelanders are the backbone of the post-nuclear world. Neither mutants nor vault-born, they are scavengers, traders, raiders, and settlers who made the open scars of the earth their home. Every scar tells a story, every bruise a lesson. They are the living testament that humanity can survive anything—even itself.
LanguageData.Baseliner.label: Wastelander
